series_metadata.series_description: This record series consists of results from criminal-records checks (including Rapback checks) conducted by BCII/FBI for applicants and licensees.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy until converted to electronic format. Once machine-readable version is verified as an accurate copy, shred paper copies. ; Electronic: For Withdrawn/Closed Applications, retain for one year after a withdrawal is granted or an application is considered closed, then destroy. For Granted Applications, retain for three years after the expiration of the credential, then destroy. For Denials/Revocations, retain for three years following the date of the denial of the application or revocation of the license, or the expiration of the applicant''s or licensee''s appeals, whichever is later, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
